entry.title: IDC W900KK07D0001 (P00049) awarded to RAYTHEON TECHNICAL SERVICES COMPANY LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY (5772), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ADD FIRM FIXED PRICE CLINS X994 PER AGREEMENT DOCUMENTED IN TASK ORDER 0122, MODIFICATION 08 AND UPDATE THE CONTRACT WITH THE CURRENT JOINT CONTRACTING COMMAND ¿ IRAQ/AFGHANISTAN (JCC-I/A) THEATER BUSINESS CLEARANCE MANDATORY CLAUSES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: RAYTHEON TECHNICAL SERVICES COMPANY LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY (5772)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATE THE SPECIAL INFANTRY TRAINING CLINS AND THEIR OPTIONS INTO THE WFF BASIC CONTRACT. THIS MODIFICATION MEMORIALIZES THE AGREEMENTS MADE REGARDING THESE EFFORTS AS INCORPORATED BY TASK ORDER 0122, MODIFICATIONS 13 AND 33.
